esphome.title: ESPHome Bluetooth Proxy Settings
esphome.description: Enter the connection details for your remote ESPHome Bluetooth Proxy

include_dpids.title: Included DPIDs
include_dpids.description: Enter additional DPIDs or DPID instances that should be included in reads besides the selected base scope

exclude_dpids.title: Excluded DPIDs
exclude_dpids.description: Enter DPIDs or DPID instances that should be completely excluded from communication, entity creation and reports

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Geberit device. Verify MAC address, Pairing PIN, proxy settings or BLE range.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid PIN code or pairing protection requires a PIN code.
error.risk_ack_required: You must explicitly accept that you use this integration at your own risk.
